entities.name: Fireflies
entities.context: Transcription service that exports meeting transcripts with text and utterance data

entities.name: MG-1
entities.context: Manifest and state management system for meeting processing

entities.name: MG-2
entities.context: Meeting processing system that generates B-block outputs

entities.name: B-blocks
entities.context: Structured output format for meeting intelligence with numbered block types

entities.name: Detailed Recap
entities.context: B01 block type - comprehensive meeting summary

entities.name: Stakeholder Intelligence
entities.context: B03 block type - information about meeting participants and stakeholders

entities.name: Decisions
entities.context: B03 block type - decisions made during meeting

entities.name: Action Items
entities.context: B05 block type - tasks and follow-ups from meeting

entities.name: Business Context
entities.context: B06 block type - broader business implications and context

entities.name: Tone and Context
entities.context: B07 block type - emotional and situational context of meeting

entities.name: Key Moments
entities.context: B21 block type - significant points or turning points in meeting

entities.name: Deliverables
entities.context: B25 block type - outputs and artifacts expected from meeting

entities.name: Meeting Metadata
entities.context: B26 block type - structural information about the meeting

relationships.context: Fireflies transcripts feed into MG-1 manifest system
MG-2 generates the various B-block outputs
B01 is a type of B-block
B03 is a type of B-block
B05 is a type of B-block
B06 is a type of B-block
B21 is a type of B-block
B25 is a type of B-block
MG-1 manifest feeds into MG-2 processing
